# EarthGND

> Professional grounding calculation tools for electricians and contractors in the Netherlands and Europe.

EarthGND provides two professional calculators for electrical grounding (Dutch: aarding, German: Erdung):

## Tools

- Resistance Calculator (/nl/tool/ohm, /en/tool/ohm, /de/tool/ohm): Free. Calculate maximum grounding resistance per NEN 1010, NEN 62305, NEN 50522. Supports TT and TN grid systems, all common RCD types.
- Rod Depth Calculator (/nl/tool/diepte, /en/tool/diepte, /de/tool/diepte): Pro (from €10/month). Calculate exact grounding rod depth based on Dutch BRO soil data (soil type, groundwater depth, pH). Uses Dwight's formula. Outputs three scenarios (favourable/average/unfavourable) and risk class I–IV.

## Key Technical Features

- BRO (Basis Registratie Ondergrond) soil data integration by Dutch postal code
- Soil resistivity (ρ), groundwater depth and pH corrections
- NEN 1010, NEN 62305, NEN 50522 compliance
- Risk classification I–IV (NEN 62305 / EN 50522)
- PDF calculation reports
- Field measurement workflow: calculator invites monteur, monteur submits field measurements, engineer confirms delivery report (opleverrapport)
- Dwight's formula with harmonic mean for effective soil resistivity

## Pricing

- Resistance Calculator: Free, no account required
- Rod Depth Calculator: €10/month subscription or €2.95 per calculation (credits)

## Supported Languages

- Dutch (nl): https://earthgnd.com/nl/
- English (en): https://earthgnd.com/en/
- German (de): https://earthgnd.com/de/

## FAQ

See /nl/faq, /en/faq, /de/faq for technical Q&A on grounding calculations, NEN standards and BRO soil data.
